title: rhodiola cretinii subsp. cretinii
intro: Rhodiola cretinii subsp. cretinii, also known as the Tibetan rhodiola or Tibetan golden root, is a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits associated with Rhodiola cretinii subsp. cretinii include improved mental clarity and focus, enhanced mood, and reduced stress levels, as well as improved immune function and cardiovascular health. Rhodiola cretinii subsp. cretinii is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
